decks.notes: This control deck revolves around using Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a key card to generate card advantage and control the board. The deck utilizes a wide range of multicolored cards to maximize Niv-Mizzet's ability to draw cards, with Bring to Light helping to search for specific answers. The addition of Omnath, Locus of Creation provides additional value and threats, while cards like Leyline Binding, Lightning Helix, and Supreme Verdict help control the opponent's board state. The deck also includes a companion in Yorion, Sky Nomad for additional value and flexibility in longer games.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively attack the opponent using a combination of low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly reduce their life total to zero. By utilizing cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage to deal damage early on, and spells like Burst Lightning and Lightning Strike to finish off opponents or clear the way for your creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. Cards like Den of the Bugbear and Castle Embereth provide additional sources of damage, while Reckless Rage and Monstrous Rage offer removal options to keep the opponent on the back foot.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo utilizing Greasefang and Parhelion II to overwhelm opponents. It includes support cards like Fleeting Spirit and Monument to Endurance to help protect and enhance the combo. The deck also includes a mix of removal spells like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize to disrupt opponents' strategies. The mana base includes a mix of dual lands and utility lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful synergies.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost creatures and using burn spells to control the board and damage the opponent. By consistently applying pressure with Monastery Swiftspear, Soul-Scar Mage, and Emberheart Challenger, along with spells like Reckless Rage and Fiery Impulse, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and finish the game quickly. The inclusion of card draw spells like Academic Dispute and Experimental Synthesizer help ensure the deck maintains a steady stream of threats. This aggressive strategy is further enhanced by the land cards, which provide mana fixing and additional utility.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with spells to bring back Arclight Phoenix from the graveyard for repeated attacks. It includes a mix of cheap cards for card draw and removal to control the board while waiting to bring back the Phoenix. The deck also includes some synergy with self-mill cards and treasure generation to help activate the Phoenix's ability. The overall strategy is to be aggressive and constantly pressure the opponent with the recurring threat of Arclight Phoenix while maintaining control of the game through card advantage and removal.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to generate incremental advantage and overwhelm opponents with powerful, evasive threats. It includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Duress to protect the combo pieces, along with removal spells like Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse to clear the way. The deck also features some utility lands like Geier Reach Sanitarium and Monument to Endurance to provide additional card advantage and resilience. By carefully navigating the early game and efficiently deploying its threats, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure victory.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on utilizing a combination of efficient creatures and powerful enchantments to quickly overwhelm opponents. By combining early mana acceleration with high-impact creatures like Righteous Valkyrie and Lyra Dawnbringer, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent and close out games quickly. The inclusion of cards like Skyclave Apparition and Collected Company provide additional removal and card advantage to maintain the deck's aggressive tempo. With a strong mana base and a mix of powerful threats, this deck aims to outpace and outvalue opponents in Pioneer 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost aggressive creatures like Soul-Scar Mage, Monastery Swiftspear, and Emberheart Challenger to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes instant spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage for removal and damage, as well as card draw and disruption with Academic Dispute and Stormchaser's Talent. The deck aims to control the board early on and continuously apply pressure to the opponent to win the game quickly. It also features some land destruction with Boomerang Basics and denial of resources with Den of the Bugbear.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Questing Druid and Monastery Swiftspear, along with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Soul-Scar Mage and Kumano Faces Kakkazan further enhances the deck's ability to control the board and push for lethal damage. The deck's strategy revolves around applying pressure early and maintaining that pressure throughout the game.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on playing efficient creatures with low mana costs to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck utilizes cards like Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves to accelerate mana production, allowing for early plays of powerful threats like Archon of Emeria and Skyclave Apparition. The inclusion of cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Ouroboroid disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Collected Company provide card advantage and board presence. The deck aims to apply constant pressure and win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and dealing damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It includes a variety of low-cost creatures and burn spells to control the board and finish off the opponent. Key cards include Monastery Swiftspear, Soul-Scar Mage, and Reckless Rage to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also utilizes lands like Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins for additional damage output. Overall, the strategy revolves around overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells to secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on creating a powerful combo involving Lotus Field, which allows for a massive mana advantage when combined with cards like Scapeshift and Lumra, Bellow of the Woods. The goal is to ramp up quickly and overwhelm the opponent with a sudden burst of resources to gain control of the game. The deck includes a variety of lands and creatures to support this combo, as well as ways to protect key pieces and sustain the strategy through card draw and recursion. It aims to win the game decisively once the combo is set up.

This deck focuses on creating a strong board presence with Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II while disrupting the opponent's strategy with Thoughtseize and Duress. Utilizing Monument to Endurance and Iron-Shield Elf to protect key pieces and generate value. The main win condition is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and control elements to secure victory. The deck aims to efficiently combo off while maintaining a strong defensive and disruptive game plan.

This deck focuses on aggressively building up a board presence with efficient creatures like Llanowar Elves and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben, while disrupting the opponent with cards like Archon of Emeria and Skyclave Apparition. Collected Company allows for explosive plays by putting more threats on the battlefield, and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provides additional removal and a win condition. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast mana, disruptive creatures, and powerful threats, all while maintaining a solid mana base for consistency.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay, and hand disruption with Duress and Thoughtseize. The creatures in the deck provide additional control elements, with Sentinel of the Nameless City able to disrupt the opponent's strategy and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse acting as a powerful threat. The mana base is designed to support both early game acceleration with Llanowar Elves and late game threats like Mutavault. Overall, the deck aims to dominate the game through resource management and strategic play.

This deck revolves around using Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. By combining cards like Fleeting Spirit and Monument to Endurance, as well as utilizing Thoughtseize and Fatal Push for control and removal, this deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and outpace the opponent. With a mix of aggressive creatures and strategic spells, this deck is designed to take advantage of its synergy to dominate the battlefield and secure victory.
